cardinal.description: Cardinal dominance amplifies opening sharpness and projection; slight preference for top notes

fixed.description: Fixed dominance deepens base stability, increases density and longevity

mutable.description: Mutable dominance smooths transition and heart note performance, increases versatility

scoring_formula.description: For each note in note_attribute_matrix, compute a raw score by comparing note attributes against a user-derived target profile. Target profile is assembled from all astro modifiers weighted by weight_hierarchy. Higher score = better match.

step_1_build_target_profile.description: Accumulate weighted deltas from each active modifier source into a single target vector
step_1_build_target_profile.accumulation_formula: target[attr] += planet_weight * sign_modifier[attr_delta] + element_weight * element_modifier[attr_delta] + house_weight * house_modifier[attr_delta] + aspect_weight * aspect_modifier[attr_delta] + modality_weight * modality_modifier[attr_delta]

step_2_normalize_target.description: Clamp target attribute values to valid ranges after accumulation

step_3_score_each_note.description: For each note, compute attribute match distance and apply multipliers
step_3_score_each_note.distance_formula: For each attribute: penalty = attribute_weight * abs(note_attribute - target_attribute)
step_3_score_each_note.element_bonus_formula: element_bonus = sum(target_element_affinity[e] * note.element_affinity[e] for e in elements) * 2
step_3_score_each_note.tag_bonus_formula: For each house modifier active: tag_bonus += house_modifier.note_tag_bonus[tag] * 3 for each matching tag in note.tags

step_4_rank_by_layer.description: Group all notes by their layer. Sort each group by final_score descending. Apply selection logic and constraints to choose final notes.

selection_logic.step_1: Compute final_score for all notes using scoring_formula
selection_logic.step_2: Partition notes by layer: top_candidates, heart_candidates, base_candidates
selection_logic.step_3: Sort each partition by final_score descending
selection_logic.step_4: Apply constraints (see constraints block) as filters and forced inclusions
selection_logic.step_5: Select top 2 notes from top_candidates, top 3 from heart_candidates, top 3 from base_candidates after constraint enforcement
selection_logic.step_6: If a constraint forces inclusion of a note not in top-N, replace the lowest-scoring eligible note of the same layer
selection_logic.step_7: Recompute coherence_score for final selection (see result_output_schema)

base_density_cap.rule: No more than 2 selected base notes may have density >= 4
base_density_cap.enforcement: If 3+ base notes with density >= 4 are selected, drop the lowest-scoring among them and substitute the next eligible base candidate

freshness_minimum.rule: At least 1 selected note (any layer) must have freshness >= 3
freshness_minimum.enforcement: If no selected note has freshness >= 3, force-include the highest-scoring note with freshness >= 3 from any layer, replacing the lowest-scoring note in the same layer

sweetness_cap.rule: No more than 2 selected notes may have sweetness >= 4
sweetness_cap.enforcement: If 3+ selected notes have sweetness >= 4, drop the lowest-scoring among them and substitute the next eligible note from the same layer without sweetness >= 4

element_stacking_limit.rule: No more than 3 selected notes may share the same dominant element (dominant = highest element_affinity value)
element_stacking_limit.enforcement: If 4+ notes share a dominant element, drop the lowest-scoring among them and substitute next eligible candidate whose dominant element differs

house_8_darkness_requirement.rule: If house 8 emphasis is high (defined as: house 8 planet count >= 2, or a personal planet [sun/moon/venus/mars/asc] occupies house 8), at least one selected note must have darkness >= 4
house_8_darkness_requirement.enforcement: Force-include the highest-scoring note with darkness >= 4. Replace lowest-scoring selected note of same layer if necessary

house_12_mystical_requirement.rule: If house 12 emphasis is high (defined as: house 12 planet count >= 2, or a personal planet occupies house 12), at least one selected note must be tagged with 'resinous', 'powdery', or 'mystical'
house_12_mystical_requirement.mystical_definition: A note is tagged 'mystical' if it evokes ambiguity, spiritual resonance, or liminal olfactory qualities — examples: Royal Oud, Patchouli, L'Afrodizyak d'Or, Istanbul, Narcissus, Lotus. Tag must be explicitly present in note.tags.
house_12_mystical_requirement.enforcement: Force-include the highest-scoring note with a qualifying tag. Replace lowest-scoring selected note of same layer if necessary

dominant_element_representation.rule: At least one selected note must support the chart's dominant element (the element with the highest total percentage from element_distribution). Support means note.element_affinity[dominant] >= 2
dominant_element_representation.enforcement: Force-include the highest-scoring note meeting the element_affinity requirement. Replace lowest-scoring note of same layer if necessary

result_output_schema.description: Schema for the output produced by the runtime engine for a given natal chart input

attribute_profile.description: Averaged attribute values of the 8 selected notes, reflecting the collective scent character

dominant_elements.description: Dominant element affinities of the final note selection, computed as sum of element_affinity values across all 8 notes

coherence_score.description: 0–100 score representing how well the selected notes form a harmonious, balanced formula. Computed as: 100 - (standard_deviation_of_final_scores * 2) - (constraint_violation_count * 10). A score above 75 is considered excellent.

short_reasoning: Each bullet is a 1-sentence explanation of why a key note was selected or why a constraint was enforced
Example: 'Bergamot selected as top note due to high air element affinity matching Gemini ASC and freshness target of 4.2'
Example: 'Royal Oud forced into base by House 8 darkness constraint (Mars in House 8)'
Example: 'Sweetness cap applied: Vanilla retained over Caramel due to higher sensuality score matching Moon in Taurus'
